name: RELAY
desc: A privacy-first messaging platform built on end-to-end encryption. Relay ensures your conversations stay private, always. No metadata collection, no backdoors.

name: OpenDih
role: OpenDih is an OpenSource research collective building collective-persona intelligence models.
desc: We fine-tune base substrates to not only write code, but to solve problems with the distinct logic, grit, and intuition of the engineers who trained it.

name: BloatWare
role: BloatWare is a Discord Bot made with a clear vision in mind
desc: The philosophers have only interpreted the world. The point, however, is to change it.
